messages.content: 请帮我翻译成英文
Please help me translate it into English.
他会带上他喜欢的玩偶，那样他会感觉好一点
He will bring along his favorite doll, so that he will feel a little better.
他很容易和新的小朋友玩在一起
He is very easy to play with new children.
我会选择抱抱他，问原因
I would choose to hug him and ask for the reason.
当他看电视看到僵尸的时候，他会感到害怕
He feels scared when he sees zombies on TV.
当他被冤枉的时候，他会感到不开心。这个时候我会问清楚原因
He feels unhappy when he is wrongly accused. At that moment, I would ask for clarification about the reason.
他有点恐高。
He is a bit scared of heights.
我会扶着他当他攀爬的时候
I would support him when he is climbing.
说实话，我没有想过这个问题
To be honest, I haven't thought about this question.
我相信我们都希望孩子在学校可以开心
I believe we all hope that children can be happy at school.
他有一个妹妹叫luna，今年4岁，在ganeiu读书
He has a younger sister named Luna, who is 4 years old and studying at Ganeiu.
我觉得他喜欢踢足球，打篮球和游泳
I feel that he likes playing football, basketball, and swimming.
我们会一起去打篮球，玩捉迷藏
We will go play basketball together and play hide and seek.
我希望他的英文能够有所提高，因为他今年6月才来的澳洲，英语水平一般
I hope his English can improve because he only came to Australia in June, and his English level is average.
希望他在学校过得开心和认识多点朋友
I hope he has a happy time at school and makes more friends.
他是个热情有礼貌的孩子
He is a warm and polite child.
